# Jewelry Image Prompt Generator — VALAC Joyas

## When to Use
- User needs AI-generated product photography for the jewelry catalog
- User needs editorial/lifestyle images for marketing, hero sections, or social media
- User needs to describe an image for any AI image generator (Gemini, DALL-E, Midjourney, Flux)
- User says "genera imagen", "prompt para foto", "necesito foto de...", "imagen de producto"

## Brand Identity — VALAC Joyas

**Who we are:** Mexican luxury jewelry brand. Oro real 10k y 14k. No chapados, no relleno.

**Visual DNA:**
- Warm, intimate, editorial — NEVER cold, sterile, or clinical
- Mexican beauty and skin tones — warm olive/brown
- Gold should always look RICH and BUTTERY — never brassy or orange
- Romantic but modern — not old-fashioned, not overly trendy
- Aspirational but accessible — think Mejuri/Ana Luisa tier, not Cartier

**Available metals (ONLY these):**
- Oro Amarillo 10k (warm yellow gold)
- Oro Amarillo 14k (richer, deeper yellow gold)  
- Oro Blanco 14k (cool silver-white, polished)
- NO Oro Rosé (we don't carry it)

**Product types:**
- Anillos (rings) — compromiso, solitarios, bandas
- Cadenas (chains) — rope, figaro, curb, box
- Aretes (earrings) — hoops, studs, drops
- Dijes (pendants/charms)
- Pulsos/Pulseras (bracelets)

---

## Prompt Structure (MANDATORY for every image)

Every jewelry image prompt MUST include ALL of these sections in order:

### 1. SUBJECT (what exactly is the piece)
```
[Product type] made of [metal type] with [stone/detail if any].
[Specific measurements/proportions if relevant].
[Key visual feature that makes this piece special].
```

### 2. SETTING & SURFACE
| Image Type | Setting |
|---|---|
| Product card | Ivory/cream marble surface, minimal, NO props |
| Editorial/lifestyle | Warm ambient setting (Mexican aesthetic, warm wood, candlelight) |
| Hero banner | Dark warm background with space for text overlay |
| Social media | Lifestyle context (hands, neck, outfit visible) |

### 3. CAMERA & COMPOSITION
```
Camera angle: [overhead/45-degree/3-quarter/macro close-up]
Lens: [macro 100mm for detail / 85mm for portrait / 50mm for lifestyle]
Depth of field: [f/1.4 ultra shallow / f/2.8 moderate / f/8 sharp throughout]
Composition rule: [rule of thirds / centered / negative space for text]
```

### 4. LIGHTING (critical for jewelry)
```
Key light: [direction, quality — soft diffused / directional / dramatic side]
Fill: [warm gold reflector / ambient / none for drama]
Specular highlights: [where sparkle should appear on the piece]
Color temperature: [3200K warm amber / 3500K warm neutral / 4000K neutral]
Diamond/stone fire: [visible rainbow dispersion? subtle or dramatic?]
Gold reflection: [warm glow on nearby surfaces]
```

### 5. COLOR & MOOD
```
Overall palette: [warm earth tones / dark romantic / bright clean]
Gold appearance: [buttery warm / rich deep / bright polished]
Skin tones (if model): [warm olive/brown, natural, NOT over-retouched]
Film look: [subtle grain? desaturated? vivid?]
```

### 6. TECHNICAL SPECS
```
Aspect ratio: [1:1 product / 16:9 hero / 4:5 mobile / 4:3 landscape]
Resolution hint: [800×800 product / 1920×1080 hero / 1200×1200 social]
```

### 7. NEGATIVE PROMPTS (what to AVOID)
Always include:
```
No watermarks, no text, no logos.
NOT cold/blue lighting.
NOT sterile/clinical jewelry-store lighting.
NOT stock photo aesthetic.
Gold must NOT look orange or brassy.
```

---

## Templates by Image Type

### PRODUCT CARD (e-commerce grid)

```
Product photography of a [METAL] [PRODUCT TYPE] [with STONE/DETAIL] on a
minimal ivory/cream marble surface. [DESCRIBE THE PIECE IN DETAIL — shape,
setting type, band width, finish, distinctive features].

The [piece] is positioned [angle to camera]. [DESCRIBE what makes this cut/
style visually distinctive and why the customer should care].

Setting: clean ivory marble with very subtle warm veining. No props, no
flowers, no fabric — JUST the piece. Soft reflection visible on surface.

Camera: [45-degree / overhead] angle, macro lens 100mm. Tack sharp on
[key detail], soft blur on [secondary element]. 

Lighting: soft diffused jewelry lightbox. [NUMBER] specular highlight(s)
on [where]. The [metal] should look [warm buttery / cool silvery / rich].
[If stone: describe fire, brilliance, rainbow flashes].

Style: luxury e-commerce product photography, similar to Mejuri, Ana Luisa,
or Brilliant Earth product pages. Clean, aspirational, modern.

Aspect ratio: 1:1 square (800×800px).
Output: photorealistic, high resolution, no watermarks, no text, no hands.
```

### EDITORIAL / ON-MODEL

```
[Cinematic/Professional] [close-up/medium shot] editorial photograph of
[describe the person — gender, skin tone, age range, minimal description].
[Describe exactly how they're wearing/showing the piece — which hand, which
finger, pose, body part visible].

The [piece] is [describe in detail]. [Explain why this angle/pose shows
off the piece's best feature].

Setting: [warm intimate location OR dark studio with warm tones]. [Describe
ambient elements if lifestyle]. Background [in focus / softly blurred / dark].

Camera: [lens mm], [depth of field], [composition — where is subject in frame].
[If hero image: specify where negative space should be for text overlay].

Lighting: [describe key, fill, rim]. Warm color temperature [K value].
[Describe how light interacts with the metal and any stones].
Skin should look natural, luminous, NOT over-retouched.

Style references: Tiffany & Co. campaign meets Mexican luxury aesthetic.
Think Vogue Mexico editorial, warm and romantic.

Aspect ratio: [based on use case].
Output: photorealistic, high resolution, no watermarks, no text, no logos.
Do NOT include any jewelry besides [the featured piece].
Do NOT make it look like a stock photo — authentic and editorial.
```

### HERO BANNER (with text overlay space)

Follow the Editorial template but add:
```
The image will be used as a background with text overlay. The [RIGHT/LEFT 
SIDE and CENTER] should have enough negative space or dark areas for 
[white/cream] text to be readable. The subject should be positioned to 
the [LEFT/RIGHT] third of the frame.
```

### LIFESTYLE / FLAT LAY

```
Overhead flat lay photograph of [describe arrangement — the piece centered,
surrounded by contextual elements]. [Describe surface — marble, linen, wood].

Elements in frame: [the jewelry piece as hero], [2-3 supporting props MAX —
e.g., dried flowers, fabric swatch, gold leaf]. Everything should feel
intentional and minimal — NOT cluttered.

Color palette: [warm earth tones / ivory and gold / dark wood and amber].
Camera: directly overhead, [lens], [depth of field].
Lighting: [soft natural window light / warm diffused studio].

Style: Instagram-worthy flat lay, luxury jewelry brand aesthetic.

Aspect ratio: 1:1 square (1200×1200px).
Output: photorealistic, no watermarks, no text.
```

---

## Metal-Specific Lighting Notes

| Metal | How It Should Look | Lighting Tip |
|---|---|---|
| Oro Amarillo 10k | Warm yellow, slightly lighter | Needs MORE fill light to avoid looking dull |
| Oro Amarillo 14k | Rich, deep buttery yellow | Best with warm side light, minimal fill |
| Oro Blanco 14k | Cool, bright silver-white | Needs COOLER fill, crisp highlights |

## Stone-Specific Notes

| Stone/Cut | Key Visual Feature | Prompt Detail |
|---|---|---|
| Redondo brillante | Maximum sparkle, symmetrical | "fire and brilliance, rainbow spectral flashes" |
| Oval | Elongates finger, large face-up | "elongated silhouette, bow-tie light pattern" |
| Princesa (square) | Modern, geometric | "sharp corners, step-cut facets visible" |
| Marquesa | Dramatic, pointed ends | "distinctive eye/boat shape, V-prongs on tips" |
| Esmeralda | Art deco, hall-of-mirrors | "step-cut rectangular facets, hall of mirrors effect" |
| Pera | Teardrop, feminine | "pointed tip and rounded bottom, asymmetric sparkle" |
| Cushion | Soft square, vintage feel | "rounded corners, large facets, vintage warmth" |

---

## Quality Checklist

Before delivering any image prompt, verify:

- [ ] Metal type is one we carry (Amarillo 10k/14k, Blanco 14k)
- [ ] Specific camera angle and lens stated
- [ ] Lighting direction and quality described (not just "good lighting")
- [ ] Gold color accurately described (buttery/rich, not orange/brassy)
- [ ] Aspect ratio matches intended use
- [ ] Negative prompts included
- [ ] If model: skin tone is warm olive/brown (Mexican beauty standard)
- [ ] If product card: clean background, no props
- [ ] Piece description includes: metal, stone/detail, setting type, band finish
- [ ] At least one distinctive selling point highlighted in the description

---

## Example Interaction

**User:** "necesito foto de una cadena de hombre oro 14k para product card"

**Output:**
```
Product photography of a 14k yellow gold rope chain (5mm width, 22 inches)
laid in a gentle S-curve on a minimal ivory marble surface...
[full detailed prompt following the PRODUCT CARD template]
```

**User:** "foto editorial de aretes de aro para hero"

**Output:**
```
Cinematic close-up editorial photograph of a young Mexican woman...
[full detailed prompt following the HERO BANNER template with text overlay space]
```
